primary_metrics.correlation_definition: Pearson corr of factor daily PnL after OLS-residualizing against equal-weight fwd_close_ret across symbols (commodity-market beta removed).
primary_metrics.greedy_selection: In-sample only: sort by ts_sharpe_mean on dates <= train_end; greedy on PnL residual corr matrix also restricted to dates <= train_end (|rho|<=0.5). Full-sample residual corr of selected subset is reported separately (may exceed 0.5).

oos_metrics.definition: Metrics computed only on dates strictly after greedy_train_end_date (same signs as full sample).

signal_similarity_corr.definition: Pearson corr of per-symbol factor time series (finalize后 z), avg over symbols

portfolio_cs_demean_true.definition: Legacy: signals CS-demeaned each day before * fwd ret, then equal-weight across symbols

methodology_notes.primary_correlation: 因子日 PnL 先对全品种等权 fwd_close_ret 做 OLS 回归，取残差再算 Pearson 相关 —— 等价于「扣掉商品大盘 beta 后，因子 alpha 还有多少互相重叠」。
methodology_notes.primary_ranking: 贪心入选：在 **训练窗内**（与 sign-train-frac 同一截止日）按 ts_sharpe_mean 降序，与已选因子在 **训练窗内** 残差相关 |rho|<=0.5 即纳入；全样本下再报入选子集的残差相关最大值（可能>0.5）。
methodology_notes.ts_sharpe_definition: 每品种纯 TS：sqrt(252)*mean/std of (signal_t × fwd_close_ret_t)，不对信号做 CS-demean；跨品种取均值。
methodology_notes.ic_definition: per-symbol Pearson/Spearman corr(signal_t, fwd_close_ret_t)；IC IR = 跨品种 IC 均值/标准差，反映稳定性。
methodology_notes.t_stat_pooled: 把所有 (date, symbol) 的 sig×ret 视为 i.i.d. 单样本，t = mean/SE；偏乐观，严格推断需 Newey–West / 块自助。
methodology_notes.t_stat_panel_ols_cluster_date: Pooled OLS: fwd_ret ~ const + signal on (date,symbol) stack; SE clustered by calendar date (缓解同日截面残差相关)。
methodology_notes.t_stat_hac_portfolio: 对单因子 **等权组合日收益**（无 CS-demean）做 OLS 常数项检验，协方差矩阵为 Newey–West HAC（maxlags=5），用于时间序列上稳健 t。
methodology_notes.t_stat_panel_hac_stacked: 面板 (date,symbol) 按日期排序拉直后 pooled OLS 的 signal 系数；HAC(Newey–West) 协方差（非严格面板推断，作补充）。
methodology_notes.t_stat_panel_double_cluster: linearmodels.PanelOLS：双向聚类（品种 entity × 交易日 time）稳健标准误。
methodology_notes.t_stat_panel_driscoll_kraay: linearmodels.PanelOLS + Bartlett kernel 协方差（Driscoll–Kraay 类，缓解截面相关与序列相关）。
methodology_notes.oos_block: oos_metrics / per_factor_oos：仅用训练截止日之后的子样本；入选子集仍由样本内贪心决定，避免前视。

sign_calibration.notes: Each factor's ±1 sign is locked using only dates <= train_end_date (portfolio Sharpe sign on the in-sample window); the same sign is then applied to the full sample. oos_sharpe_signed reports the Sharpe on the post-cutoff window in the chosen direction.
